q: In a two-way exchange, what type of ions are exchanged between two ion exchangers?

In triangle ABC, side BD is perpendicular to AC. If angle DBC = 71 degrees, then BC is extended to point E such that angle CAE = 55 degrees and angle AEB is a right angle, what is the measure of angle AEB?

In a certain code language, the letters A, B, C, D, E, and F are seated in a row. A and E are seated next to each other, but A is exactly to the right of D. E is seated to the left of B and to the right of F. C is not the immediate neighbour of A. Who is seated exactly in the middle?
o: E does not sit at any one place

q: Seven boxes B, D, E, P, S, and T are kept one above another, but not necessarily in the same order. Only one box is kept between B and S, and S is kept above B. Only three boxes are kept between E and T. P is kept just above the box which is kept just above E. The box D is kept above B. How many boxes are kept above box S?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series: 5 9 16 26 39 ?
